title: Polaroid
description: Adds a Polaroid camera to Minecraft
body:
# Polaroid

This mod adds a Polaroid camera capable of capturing images and "printing" them into the player's inventory. Additionally, photos can be displayed on an item frame, and right-clicked to make larger.

## How to use
1. Right click to scope-in
2.  Left click to capture an image

![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1008539448016916717/1011047045735395448/ModFest_Singularity_Banner.png)
